entries.title: Commentary on leviticus 7:3
entries.excerpt: What is the tail, except the end of the body? And that man sacrifices well who continues his offering of good works right to the end of the required action. So the tail of a beast must be offered on the altar so that we will carry out to the end every good work that we begin. Exposition of the Old and New Testament, Leviticus

entries.title: EXPOSITION OF THE OLD AND NEW TESTAMENT, LEVITICUS 7 on leviticus 7:3
entries.excerpt: What is the tail, except the end of the body? And that man sacrifices well who continues his offering of good works right to the end of the required action. So the tail of a beast must be offered on the altar so that we will carry out to the end every good work that we begin.
